ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), OR( RecordType.Name = "Case External Italy v2", RecordType.Name = "Case External Brazil", RecordType.Name = "Case External Austria", RecordType.Name = "Case External Switzerland" ), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed'),ISPICKVAL(Complaint_justified__c,"Yes"), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status))) ), OR(AND(NOT(ISNULL(TEXT(Reopening_Reason__c))),NOT(ISCHANGED(Reopening_Reason__c))),AND(ISCHANGED(Reopening_Reason__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Reopening_Reason__c, 'New Request')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Reopening_Reason__c, 'Sender Acknowledgement')), ISPICKVAL(Reopening_Reason__c, 'Case Not Solved'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Complaint'),OR(ISBLANK(Financial_impact__c),ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_type__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_reason__c)),ISBLANK(TEXT(Solution__c)),ISBLANK(Detail_ActionPlan__c))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must fill in all fields in the “Complaints” section
